title: President Ramaphosa to address the nation
description: NATIONAL NEWS - According to the Presidency,...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - According to the Presidency, President Cyril Ramaphosa will address the nation tonight, Sunday, 30 November 2025, following South Africa’s Presidency of the G20 and the successful hosting of the G20 Leaders’ Summit in Johannesburg.


> The President’s address will take place as follows:


- Date: 30 November 2025
- Time: 19:00
- Venue: Union Buildings, Pretoria

The SABC will provide a live feed to all media houses, and the Presidency (@PresidencyZA) will stream the address live across its digital platforms.

www.thepresidency.gov.za

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
